change_summary: Bootstrap: scribe MCP v0.0.1 with three-tool data-layer API (init, read, update). Per-repo documentarian pattern.
Synthesized the real card for scribe v0.0.1 — replaces the scribe_init placeholder. Reflects ADR-001 (no LLM inside), GUARD-001/002/003, lighthouse north star ns_c5a90a5cc690, and the three-tool API.
Tick 9: scribe now knows its team. Added team.yaml (12 members) + read_team loader + scribe_team MCP tool. Card updated to list known teammates in frontmatter.

Tick 10: scribe/.hone/hone.yaml written, mirroring visionlog GUARD-001/002/003 plus vision into hone per-target contract format. Future hone ticks on scribe now surface guardrails as hard constraints. Log-only update (card unchanged this tick, per scribe-is-small principle).

scribe repo committed to git for the first time. Commit ce2fc5b on main: 28 files. Trajectory + visionlog state + lighthouse state + team roster all durable. No code changes to scribe itself this tick; log-only update.

Tick 17: Scribe is now public at https://github.com/eidos-agi/scribe. Exercised the measure.cmd from scribe/.hone/hone.yaml for the first time — proves the yaml→bash→signal pipeline works end-to-end. Current signal: 2 distinct non-cli callers (hone, hone-session), 6 total updates. Card updated to include github_url, visibility=public, measure_snapshot, and a git clone install path that actually works for outsiders.

Tick 19: Added license=Apache-2.0 + license-files=[LICENSE] to pyproject.toml. Card's license field updated from "(none yet — repo is unlicensed; add one before external use)" to "Apache-2.0" now that LICENSE file exists and pyproject declares it.

Tick 21: scribe now has 9 smoke tests (pytest), all passing in 0.03s. Covers card.py end-to-end. Includes meta-test validating team.yaml roster entries all have required fields, and a static-scan regression test for ADR-001 (no LLM SDK imports in src/scribe/). pytest added as dev-group dep. Log-only update.
Tick 29: scribe_read now returns callers_seen (sorted distinct author_tools from updates.jsonl). Purely additive, 8/8 tests pass. Log-only update; card unchanged this tick.

Tick 33: scribe pivoted from data-layer-only to technical-writer + documentation-curation framing. ADR-004 accepted in visionlog (supersedes ADR-001). TASK-0005 created in ike for v0.1.0 implementation (path-generic API, scribe_review, scribe_suggest, scribe.yaml config). README.md rewritten to match: "Technical writer for your repo. Authors and curates the docs that tell the project what it is." v0.0.1 is still what's shipped; v0.1.0 is the planned catch-up. No code changes this tick — ADR + task + README only.
